name: Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Place crackers on the bottom of a buttered 12 x 7 glass pan. Set aside.
2. In a 4-cup glass measuring cup, combine butter and brown sugar. Microwave on high for 2 minutes or until butter is melted. Stir in nuts.
3. Pour the mixture over the crackers. Microwave on high for 4-5 minutes or until bubbly.
4. Top with chocolate chips and continue cooking on high for 1 1/2 minutes until chocolate is softened. Spread across the top.
5. Chill for 30 minutes. Cut or break into serving pieces.
